name: Winged Boots
entries: These boots have 4 charges and regain {@dice 1d4} expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the boots, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 charge, gaining a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 30 feet for 1 hour. If you are flying when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 feet per round until you land.
